texto: Did he judge on appearance alone? would he judge me? "Goth" doesn't cut it when it comes to a word that describes me. I'm complex. Complicated. No one gets me, and I like it that way.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kelly McClymer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “Did he judge on appearance alone? would he judge me? "Goth" doesn't cut it when it comes to a wor…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, judgement, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love.

frase_original: Did he judge on appearance alone? would he judge me? "Goth" doesn't cut it when it comes to a word that describes me. I'm complex. Complicated. No one gets me, and I like it that way.
